title: Requirement Gathering
description: Stakeholder needs are gathered and converted into clear, actionable requirements.

title: Design and UI/UX
description: Requirements are transformed into system architecture, UI/UX designs, and finalized technology decisions.

title: Development
description: The solution is developed iteratively using defined standards, chosen technologies, and regular collaboration.

title: Testing and Deployment
description: The software is tested to fix issues and ensure quality, then deployed with monitoring to ensure stability.

title: Maintenance & Support
description: Post-launch, performance is monitored, issues are resolved, and updates are released based on user feedback.
